ui_response.ui_state: Outline generated with empty card (just '1'), no warning text shown. Generation button still available.

diagnosis.domain_fix_detail: DB domain fixed to ai.api.gamma.app is now being intercepted by Etap (403 response confirms)
diagnosis.pattern: Etap blocks the generation request with 403 but does not inject warning text. Gamma frontend shows empty outline without any user-facing error or warning message.
diagnosis.likely_cause: 403 response is a plain block without warning content. For warning to display, Etap needs to return 200 with warning text in the response body rather than 403.
action_needed: Confirm Gamma APF entry uses warning mode (blocked=0 or warning flag) not block mode
If warning mode: check that response format matches what Gamma expects from ai.api.gamma.app
Gamma generation endpoint may need specific response format - check HAR for expected Content-Type
403 suggests block mode is active, not warning mode - need to update APF config
